name: Pioneer Transportation Corp

notes: Strong match on legal name, exact street address (2890 Arthur Kill Rd), Staten Island NY. Fleet of 725 power units / 567 drivers per MCS-150 dated 1/9/2025. Operating status ACTIVE per SAFER. Safety rating non-ratable; last compliance review 2009. Pioneer transports ~40,000 NYC students/day. BBB business start 1/12/2005; company markets 50+ years of operation, suggesting earlier predecessor — incorporation 2005 may be a re-incorporation. NY DOS direct lookup blocked.

name: Lakeside Transportation
officers: Sharon Pierluissi (Manager); subsidiary/sister company of Cook-Illinois Corporation (John Benish Jr., President)
registry_source: BBB Waukegan profile (start 1/1/2005); Cook-Illinois corporate site; Illinois SOS search not directly accessed
notes: Operating address is 2794 Northwestern Ave, Waukegan, IL 60087 (depot); Oak Brook 2100 Clearwater Dr is the Cook-Illinois corporate office address per input. Lakeside Transportation is a wholly owned subsidiary/sister of Cook-Illinois Corporation (the largest family-owned school bus operator in the US, ~2,300 buses across 18 subsidiaries). Began operations Aug 2004 with a large special-education contract. SAFER keyword search for LAKESIDE TRANSPORTATION returned only carriers in MO/MN/MI (unrelated) — the Illinois operation does not appear under its own DBA in SAFER, likely operating intrastate under Illinois Commerce Commission authority or under a Cook-Illinois group USDOT. Could not confidently match a SAFER record.

name: Metro Transport LLC
carrier_operation: For-hire passenger ground transportation (charter bus, shuttle, limo, special services); part of Kansas City Transportation Group
inc_date: unknown (entity active by 1999 per NLRB case; KCTG founded 1988/1994)
officers: Affiliated with Kansas City Transportation Group (KCTG); also operated DBAs Yellow Cab Company and Kansas City Taxi at same Lydia Ave address
entity_status: active (operating per BBB and KCTG site)
registry_source: NLRB case 17-RC-011776 (filed 1999) identifies 'Metro Transport LLC d/b/a Metropolitan Transportation Services, Inc.' at 1300 Lydia Ave; BBB profile of Kansas City Transportation Group; Missouri SOS (bsd.sos.mo.gov) blocked HTTP 403
notes: Address 1300 Lydia Ave, Kansas City MO 64106 matches Kansas City Transportation Group (KCTG) corporate office, parent of Metropolitan Transportation Services / Yellow Cab. NLRB confirmed entity 'Metro Transport LLC d/b/a Metropolitan Transportation Services, Inc.' Workers include charter bus drivers, shuttle bus drivers, special services drivers, KCI Shuttle ticket sellers, limo drivers, mechanics. SAFER keyword searches for 'METRO TRANSPORT' and 'METROPOLITAN TRANSPORTATION SERVICES' returned no carrier matching Kansas City MO at 1300 Lydia; carrier MC-1032831/USDOT 3271371 (Bristol PA) is a different unrelated Metro Transport LLC. KCTG may operate under a different legal USDOT name. Treat fleet/USDOT as unknown.
